limits: The cohort contains ten completed ratified executions per declared model alias.
The pilot cohort is excluded from the replication primary and secondary estimates.
The declared model identifiers are mutable provider aliases rather than immutable snapshots.
The analysis is descriptive and does not authorize pairwise model ranking or significance testing.
The cohort tests one frozen memory-boundary task and does not establish general model performance.
The result does not establish alignment, safety, legal conformity, or regulatory approval.
